headline: State Street Corporation Announces Planned 10% Dividend Increase and 2026 Federal Reserve Supervisory Stress Test Results
summary: BOSTON, June 24, 2026--State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) today announced its intention to increase its common stock dividend by 10% to $0.92 per share in the third quarter of 2026, subject to approval by its Board of Directors. State Street remains authorized to repurchase common shares under its existing share repurchase program previously approved by its Board of Directors.

headline: State Street Investment Management Expands Low-Cost Core Suite with New Nasdaq® 100 ETF
summary: BOSTON, June 24, 2026--State Street Investment Management today announced the launch of the State Street® SPDR® Portfolio Nasdaq® 100 ETF (QNDX), designed to track the Nasdaq-100 Index® and provide investors with a low-cost, growth-oriented core equity allocation. Priced at 10 bps, investors may consider QNDX a foundational portfolio building block across market cycles.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on State Street, Raises Price Target to $196
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Mike Mayo   maintains State Street (NYSE:STT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $171 to $196.

headline: Citi Boosts State Street (STT) Target on Strong Business Fundamentals
summary: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) is included among Billionaire Mario Gabelli’s Top 12 Dividend Stocks. On June 23, Citi raised its price recommendation on State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) to $193 from $172. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The update came as part of its second-quarter earnings preview. The firm said it sees upside […]
